MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610). After hearing, dismissal order not issued. Dismissal entire action filed NOV-27-2012.
